data.content: Planning complete for per-step output targets. Current system already has per-action output definitions in ProfileDefinition.outputs and per-step resolution via StepMetadata.output. Five gaps identified: (G1) artifact_type is unvalidated free-form string, (G2) no live_deployment target, (G3) OutputMode enum disconnected from runtime strings, (G4) prompt templates only cover remote_main/pr conditionals, (G5) no bundle parsing validation. Three children ready for sequential execution: c8f4 (schema/runtime validation) → 0d93 (prompt rendering for all targets) → 9727 (regression coverage). No code changes made during planning. Risk: validation strictness for external bundles — recommend extensible approach.
